item.title: 达美航空高层人事变动：首席财务官詹基转任首席运营官，卡特出任总裁
item.description: 达美航空周四宣布进行大规模领导层调整，任命首席财务官丹·扬基为首席运营官，并提拔彼得·卡特担任总裁。此次人事变动旨在为长期运营主管约翰·劳瑟即将退休做准备。【原文：Delta Air Lines on Thursday ‌announced a broad leadership shake-up, naming Chief Financial Officer Dan Janki as chief operating officer and promoting Peter Carter to president as the carrier prepares for the ​retirement of longtime operations chief John Laughter.】

item.title: 加密货币交易所OKX估值达250亿美元，纽约证券交易所母公司注资后
item.description: 全球最大加密货币交易所之一OKX在获得洲际交易所（Intercontinental Exchange）的少数股权投资后，估值达到250亿美元。纽约证券交易所母公司于周四宣布了这一消息。【原文：OKX, one of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchanges, was valued at $25 billion after it received a minority ​investment from Intercontinental Exchange , the NYSE parent said on Thursday.】

item.title: 美国稀土公司将以7300万美元收购得克萨斯州圆顶矿床剩余股权
item.description: 美国稀土公司周四宣布，将以7300万美元的全股票交易收购得克萨斯州某稀土矿床剩余少数股权，此举旨在推动关键矿产的国内生产。【原文：USA Rare Earth said on Thursday it would acquire the remaining minority interest ​in a Texas rare earth deposit in an all-stock transaction ‌worth $73 million, as part of its efforts to boost domestic production of critical minerals.】

item.title: Meta将允许AI竞争对手进入WhatsApp，以避免欧盟采取行动
item.description: Meta Platforms公司表示，将允许人工智能竞争对手在WhatsApp平台上运营一年，此举旨在避免欧盟反垄断监管机构可能颁布的临时禁令——此前被该即时通讯服务拒之门外的竞争对手曾提出投诉。【原文：Artificial intelligence rivals will be allowed on WhatsApp for a year, Meta Platforms said, aiming to head off a possible temporary order from EU ​antitrust regulators after complaints from competitors shut out of the messaging service.】

item.title: 早盘行情：全球市场暂歇
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: DHL继续接受中东地区订单，但提醒可能出现延误
item.description: 尽管中东地区冲突不断升级，DHL首席执行官周四表示该公司仍在接受该地区的配送订单，但警告称将出现延误。【原文：DHL is still accepting delivery orders in the Middle East despite ​the escalating conflict, its chief executive ‌said on Thursday, but warned there would be delays.】

item.title: 消息人士称，印度炼油厂正开采俄罗斯近海浮式原油
item.description: 据两位知情人士周四透露，印度炼油商已开始从停泊在印度海岸外的油轮上提取俄罗斯原油，以弥补因伊朗战争导致的中东原油供应缺口。【原文：Refiners in India have started tapping Russian oil aboard vessels floating off ‌the country's coast to make up for the loss of Middle Eastern crude due to the Iran war, two sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Thursday.】

item.title: 克罗格公司预测年度销售额和利润增长乏力，新任首席执行官正式履新
item.description: 克罗格公司周四预测全年销售额和利润增长乏力，这家超市连锁运营商在新任首席执行官领导下正面临消费环境的不确定性。【原文：Kroger forecast tepid annual sales and profit ​on Thursday, as the supermarket ‌chain operator navigates an uncertain spending environment under a new CEO.】

item.title: 比亚迪推出新一代刀片电池，具备寒冷环境下的快速充电能力
item.description: 中国汽车制造商比亚迪董事长王传福周四发布了第二代刀片电池，称其在极寒环境下具备"颠覆性"充电速度。【原文：Chinese carmaker BYD's chairman Wang Chuanfu ​on Thursday launched the second-generation of the ‌Blade Battery, with what he says is a "disruptive" charging speed in extremely cold environments.】

item.title: 英国新锐品牌Nothing为新款手机注入缤纷色彩，打破科技界的"单调"局面
item.description: Nothing——这家由卡尔·佩伊在伦敦创立的智能手机制造商——于周四推出了新款中端手机和耳机，在原有的白、黑、灰三色基础上新增配色，以吸引精通数字技术的年轻客户。【原文：Nothing, ​the smartphone maker founded in London by Carl Pei, launched new mid-tier handsets and ‌headphones on Thursday, adding new colours to its white, black and grey palette to appeal to digitally adept younger customers.】

item.title: 私募股权公司审慎评估数据公司交易，人工智能担忧抑制投资热情
item.description: 金融数据提供商FactSet近几个月引起了托马斯·布拉沃和赫尔曼·弗里德曼的关注。据三位知情人士透露，在人工智能颠覆性担忧推动其股价过去六个月下跌39%后，这两家私募股权公司正评估潜在收购方案。【原文：Financial data provider FactSet caught the eye of Thoma Bravo and Hellman & Friedman in recent months, with both private equity firms running the numbers on a potential ​acquisition after AI disruption fears helped drive a 39% drop in its shares over the last six months, three people familiar with the matter say.】

item.title: Revolut申请美国银行牌照，任命杜兰索伊为美国首席执行官
item.description: 英国金融科技公司Revolut周四宣布，已申请美国银行牌照，并任命前Visa高管塞廷·杜兰索伊（Cetin Duransoy）为美国新任首席执行官。【原文：Britain's Revolut applied for a U.S. bank charter and appointed former Visa executive Cetin Duransoy as its new CEO for the United ​States, the fintech company announced on Thursday.】

item.title: 博通股价上涨，因其宣称2027年人工智能芯片销售额将突破1000亿美元
item.description: 博通股价周四盘前大涨约7%，此前该公司表示预计2027年人工智能芯片销售额将突破1000亿美元，正积极进军长期由英伟达主导的市场。【原文：Broadcom shares jumped about 7% before the bell on Thursday after the company said it expects artificial intelligence ​chip sales to top $100 billion in 2027, as ‌it pushes into a market long ruled by Nvidia.】

item.title: 消息人士称，随着谈判陷入僵局，中国扩大了对必和必拓铁矿石的限制措施
item.description: 知情人士向路透社透露，随着长达数月的合同纠纷持续，中国国有铁矿石采购商已扩大对必和必拓新海运铁矿石货物的采购限制。【原文：China's state-run iron ore buyer has widened restrictions on buying new seaborne iron ore cargoes from BHP as a months-long ​contract dispute drags on, people with knowledge of the ‌matter told Reuters.】

item.title: 中国京东季度营收未达预期
item.description: 中国电商巨头京东周四公布的季度营收未达市场预期，这表明激烈竞争和政府补贴效益减弱正侵蚀着该公司的需求。【原文：China's JD.com missed market estimates for quarterly revenue on Thursday, in ​a sign that stiff competition and waning ‌benefits from government subsidies were eating into demand at the e-commerce giant.】

item.title: 解读：中国新五年规划对大宗商品市场的规划是什么
item.description: 中国周四在年度议会会议上公布了第十五个五年规划，概述了北京对经济的优先事项以及将获得政策支持和资金的领域。【原文：China unveiled its 15th five-year plan on Thursday at its annual parliamentary meeting, outlining Beijing's priorities for the economy and sectors slated for policy support and funding.】

item.title: 英国汽车制造商协会数据显示，随着中国竞争加剧，特斯拉在英国的汽车销量下滑37%
item.description: 英国汽车制造商和贸易商协会（SMMT）周四公布的数据显示，特斯拉2月份在英国的销量同比下滑37%，这家汽车制造商持续面临比亚迪等中国竞争对手电动汽车需求激增的压力。【原文：Tesla's UK sales dropped 37% in February from a year earlier, data from the Society of Motor Manufacturers and ​Traders (SMMT) showed on Thursday, as the automaker stayed under ‌pressure from booming demand for EVs from Chinese competitors such as BYD .】

item.title: 全球经济面临通胀与增长考验，伊朗局势持续升级——高盛
item.description: 高盛分析师周四表示，随着伊朗局势升级导致中东关键油气供应受阻，油价若暂时飙升至每桶100美元，可能使全球经济增速放缓0.4个百分点。【原文：A temporary surge in oil prices to $100 per barrel could slow global growth by 0.4 percentage point, Goldman ​Sachs analysts said on Thursday, as a widening conflict ‌in Iran chokes off vital Middle East oil and gas flows.】

item.title: 中国芯片巨头呼吁出台扶持政策，打造"中国版ASML"
item.description: 中国半导体行业高层呼吁在2026至2030年期间开展全国协同攻关，研发可投入生产的制程光刻系统，彰显了北京方面推动技术自主的决心。【原文：Top Chinese semiconductor executives have called for a ​coordinated national effort to develop operational lithography systems during the 2026-2030 period, underlining Beijing's push ‌for greater technological self-reliance.】

item.title: 存储芯片制造商铠侠、零售运营商泛太平洋将被纳入日经指数
item.description: 日本内存芯片制造商铠侠（Kioxia）以及旗下拥有大型折扣零售商唐吉诃德（Don Quijote）的泛太平洋国际控股（Pan Pacific International Holdings）将于4月起被纳入日本日经指数，该指数发布方周四宣布。【原文：Japanese memory chipmaker ​Kioxia and Pan Pacific International ‌Holdings , which has major discount retailer Don Quijote under its wing, will ​be added to Japan's Nikkei ​from April, the publisher of the ⁠stock average said on Thursday.】

item.title: 据媒体报道，中国Neolix公司暂停在阿布扎比的自动驾驶汽车运营
item.description: 中国媒体《第一财经》周四报道称，中国自动驾驶汽车制造商Neolix已暂停其无人驾驶汽车在阿布扎比的日常运营。此前，美国与以色列对伊朗的战争已使阿联酋局势动荡不安。【原文：Chinese ​autonomous delivery vehicle maker Neolix has suspended ‌daily operations of its driverless vehicles in Abu Dhabi, Chinese media Yicai reported on Thursday, as the United ​Arab Emirates (UAE) has been roiled by the ​U.S.-Israel war with Iran.】

item.title: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局称，福特因雨刮器问题将在美国召回近60.5万辆汽车
item.description: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）周四表示，福特汽车公司正在美国召回604,533辆汽车，原因是挡风玻璃雨刷电机可能失效，导致能见度降低并增加碰撞风险。【原文：Ford is ​recalling 604,533 vehicles in ‌the U.S. because the windshield wiper motor may fail, ​reducing visibility and ​increasing the risk of a ⁠crash, the U.S. National ​Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) ​said on Thursday.】

item.title: 美国股指期货下跌，投资者权衡中东战争影响
item.description: 周四美国股指期货小幅走低，投资者正消化中东战事升级引发的连锁反应，此前市场在前日曾出现短暂反弹。【原文：U.S. stock ​index futures edged lower on Thursday as investors digested the widening fallout from ‌an intensifying Middle East war, after markets staged a tentative bounce a day earlier.】

item.title: WH史密斯上半年销售额增长5%，得益于北美市场提振
item.description: 旅游零售商WH Smith周四报告称，得益于北美地区两位数的增长，上半年营收增长5%，并表示公司正按计划实现全年目标。【原文：Travel retailer WH Smith ​reported a 5% rise ‌in first-half revenue on Thursday, helped by double-digit growth ​in North America, and ​said it was on track ⁠to meet its full-year ​targets.】

item.title: 多乐士制造商利洁时瞄准"必须赢得"的新兴市场持续增长
item.description: 利洁时首席执行官克里斯·利希特将中国和印度等国视为这家消费品公司的"必胜市场"。该公司周四公布的季度销售额超出预期，主要得益于新兴市场连续第十个季度实现两位数增长。【原文：Reckitt CEO Kris Licht identified countries such ‌as China and India as a "must-win set of markets" for the consumer goods company, which on Thursday delivered a quarterly sales beat, led by a 10th consecutive quarter of double-digit expansion in emerging markets.】

item.title: 印尼就虚假信息问题向Meta发出"严正警告"
item.description: 印度尼西亚通信部周四表示，已对Meta Platforms公司发出"严厉警告"，因其未能遏制网络赌博和虚假信息的传播。【原文：Indonesia's communications ministry has issued a "stern warning" to Meta Platforms Inc for ​failing to curb the spread of online ‌gambling and disinformation, the ministry said on Thursday.】

item.title: DHL预计2026年营业利润将增长，尽管地缘政治环境持续恶化
item.description: 德国物流集团DHL周四预测，尽管地缘政治环境持续恶化，其2026年营业利润仍将实现增长，这一预期基本符合市场预期。【原文：German logistics group DHL on Thursday forecast a higher operating profit for 2026, broadly in line with market expectations, ​despite the worsening geopolitical environment.】

item.title: 晨间竞价：是"路上的小疙瘩"还是"深不见底的鸿沟"？
item.description: 罗基·斯威夫特带您展望欧洲及全球市场今日走势【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Rocky Swift】

item.title: 澳大利亚法院认定两名前星际高管违反职责，监管机构称
item.description: 澳大利亚公司监管机构周四表示，已认定星娱乐集团（Star Entertainment）的两名前高管在处理洗钱及犯罪活动相关风险时存在失职行为。【原文：Australia's corporate regulator said on Thursday it has found ​two former senior executives of Star Entertainment in ‌breach of duties over the handling of risks associated with money laundering and criminal activity.】

item.title: 易腐货物与飞机零件滞留，中东冲突冲击航空货运
item.description: 从新鲜农产品到飞机零件的各类货物运输陷入停滞，中东冲突升级导致全球航空货运能力减少逾五分之一，运费随之上涨，企业高管们正为货物积压问题做准备。【原文：Shipments ranging from fresh produce to airplane parts are in limbo as ​an escalating Middle East conflict reduces the world's air cargo capacity by more than one-fifth and pushes up freight rates, with executives bracing ‌for backlogs of goods.】
